personal.preferred_title: Senior Oracle / AWS Data Migration Engineer

summary: Senior Oracle, SQL, and AWS Data Migration Engineer with 20+ years of enterprise IT experience across PL/SQL, Oracle data models, legacy modernization, SQL performance tuning, ETL/schema transformation, reporting workflows, AWS data services, Python scripting, documentation, and production support. Strong background understanding legacy business logic, validating migrated data, optimizing database access patterns, and translating undocumented or complex system behavior into repeatable migration and support processes. Experienced with Oracle/PLSQL-heavy environments, AWS S3/Glue/Athena/Redshift patterns, reporting modernization concepts, and vendor/stakeholder collaboration.

experience.title: Senior Systems & Data Migration Engineer
bullets: Led migration of a high-throughput shopping-engine data platform from 200+ MySQL nodes to a 6-node Oracle RAC cluster while preserving correctness, performance, and production reliability.
Built validation utilities to compare source and target records across millions of transactions during phased migration cutovers.
Optimized SQL/database access patterns, data structures, and migration routines to maintain sub-second query latency and reduce production risk.
Automated schema conversion, data validation, and migration-support processes to improve repeatability and cutover confidence.
Documented migration behavior, validation procedures, performance findings, and support patterns for enterprise engineering teams.

experience.title: Senior Capacity & Data Engineer
bullets: Designed and supported Python, SQL, Pandas, and PySpark-oriented ETL pipelines that transformed telemetry from 6,000+ endpoints into curated datasets for analytics, forecasting, capacity planning, and executive reporting.
Built Oracle-backed historical retention structures, SQL reporting tables, views, and query patterns to support operational analytics, capacity reporting, and decision support.
Built AWS-aligned data workflows using S3 landing zones, AWS Glue ETL patterns, Athena, Redshift, EC2/ECS, IAM concepts, and CloudWatch-style monitoring concepts to modernize analytics workloads.
Developed reusable ingestion, transformation, validation, reconciliation, exception-handling, and recurring reporting automation to improve pipeline reliability and reduce manual effort.
Implemented data quality checks, validation rules, reconciliation logic, and issue investigation workflows to improve data accuracy, consistency, and downstream reporting confidence.
Troubleshot data issues by tracing source feeds, schema changes, transformation logic, SQL behavior, missing data, reporting defects, and downstream consumer expectations.
Produced data dictionaries, runbooks, validation notes, dashboard narratives, and process documentation to support governance, auditability, lineage-style traceability, and production handoff.
Partnered with infrastructure, application, operations, vendor-adjacent, and management stakeholders to clarify requirements, explain system behavior, and support modernization decisions.

experience.title: Developer / Support Engineer, Billing Interfaces and Data Workflows
bullets: Developed and supported billing, invoicing, settlement, EDI, and reporting workflows using Oracle, PL/SQL, Pro*C, C/C++, Java/J2EE, XML, Perl, Korn Shell, and UNIX/Linux.
Maintained production data integration interfaces and reporting workflows where accuracy, repeatability, secure processing, and timely support were critical.
Improved data-processing performance through SQL/database optimization, memory reduction, throughput improvements, and production defect triage.
Reverse-engineered and documented undocumented AMDOCS APIs and legacy integration behavior to support modernization, interface work, and production support.
Created technical documentation and support notes for legacy systems, data interfaces, automation jobs, and operational processes.

experience.title: Architect / Developer, IRS CADE Project
bullets: Designed UML class and sequence diagrams and developed modules for IRS CADE modernization work.
Built CICS/MQ Series/XML messaging interfaces in VC++ with DB2 backend while following government system architecture standards.
Supported legacy modernization activities involving structured design, interface logic, data movement, and technical documentation.

experience.title: Senior Consultant / CA APM SME
bullets: Built SQL, Perl, and Korn Shell extraction/reporting scripts that automated recurring telemetry exports and improved repeatability of operational reports.
Designed dashboards, alert thresholds, reporting standards, and documentation used across regulated financial-services monitoring and operations teams.
Partnered with application, middleware, database, and operations teams to diagnose production bottlenecks using telemetry, SQL, and system evidence.
Delivered technical documentation, onboarding guidance, and knowledge-sharing materials for application and support teams.

education.degree: Post-Graduate Diploma in Computer Engineering Technology / Computer Science
Bachelor of Science in Civil Engineering

skills.Oracle / SQL: Oracle, Oracle RAC, PL/SQL, SQL, SQL tuning, stored procedure logic concepts, functions/packages/views/triggers concepts, query optimization, reporting tables, historical retention models
skills.Migration / Modernization: Legacy modernization, database migration, schema transformation, source-to-target mapping, phased cutover support, validation utilities, migration documentation, undocumented logic analysis
skills.AWS Data Platform: Amazon S3, AWS Glue, Athena, Redshift, IAM concepts, CloudWatch concepts, Lambda concepts, AWS data lake and warehouse modernization patterns, QuickSight concepts
skills.ETL / Data Engineering: ETL workflows, data extraction, transformation, validation, reconciliation, data cleansing, data conversion, reporting-ready datasets, scheduled job documentation, backend automation support
skills.Languages / Scripting: Python, SQL, PL/SQL, PySpark, Perl, Korn Shell, C, C++, Pro*C, Java/J2EE, XML, JSON, HTML/JavaScript legacy exposure
skills.Reporting / BI: SQL reporting workflows, Oracle reporting layers, operational dashboards, executive reporting, Streamlit, Plotly, matplotlib, seaborn, Crystal Reports migration awareness, Power BI/QuickSight concepts
skills.Data Quality: Data validation, reconciliation checks, schema checks, accuracy/consistency controls, performance validation, source/target comparison, data integrity checks, issue investigation
skills.Performance: SQL optimization, database access tuning, query performance analysis, high-volume transaction support, memory/throughput improvement, production defect triage
skills.Documentation / Collaboration: Architecture documentation, data model documentation, workflow documentation, runbooks, vendor collaboration, stakeholder requirements clarification, technical handoff, knowledge sharing
skills.Adjacent / Learning: AWS QuickSight, Power BI concepts, Crystal Reports modernization concepts, DHTML/legacy UI conversion awareness, PowerShell awareness, Snowflake/dbt self-study

projects.name: Legacy Database Migration and Validation Framework
projects.description: Led and supported high-volume migration work involving source/target validation, schema conversion, SQL optimization, cutover support, and production reliability checks.

projects.name: Serverless Lakehouse Platform on AWS
projects.description: Designed a serverless AWS data platform using S3, Glue, Athena, Redshift, Parquet, and PySpark-oriented processing patterns to support curated analytics, query optimization, small-file mitigation, and reliable downstream reporting.

projects.name: Enterprise Reporting and Telemetry Data Pipelines
projects.description: Built SQL and Python automation that converted operational telemetry and legacy reporting inputs into validated datasets, dashboards, recurring reports, and stakeholder-facing analysis.
